differential_diagnoses: Viral myocarditis (e.g., Dengue, Chikungunya, or other endemic arboviruses)
next_steps: Dengue NS1 antigen and IgM/IgG serology
Repeat thick and thin blood smears for malaria
Send blood and cerebrospinal fluid for arbovirus/viral PCR panels
Echocardiogram to further evaluate biventricular function and potential myopericarditis
Serum ferritin, triglycerides, and fibrinogen to evaluate for HLH
Broaden microbiological cultures and consider diagnostic paracentesis if ascites volume permits
Continue supportive care for refractory distributive and cardiogenic shock

differential_diagnoses: Dengue shock syndrome with severe myocarditis
Septic shock due to bacterial translocation (cirrhotic patient)
Viral myocarditis (e.g., Chikungunya or other enterovirus)
next_steps: Diagnostic paracentesis for cell count, culture, and Gram stain
Trypanosoma cruzi blood PCR and peripheral blood smear examination for trypomastigotes
Dengue NS1 antigen and arbovirus PCR panel
Serum ferritin, triglyceride, and fibrinogen levels for HLH evaluation
Formal transthoracic echocardiogram to assess for wall motion abnormalities and myocarditis
Serum procalcitonin, troponin I, and NT-proBNP levels
Adrenal insufficiency workup (random cortisol and ACTH stimulation test)
